gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed release bundle plan-execution sidecars, flagged exact return-code validation and combined sidecar coverage, and reported Clean after fixes.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review clean after resolving return-code validation and combined-sidecar test findings
what_changed: Added optional benchmark plan execution sidecars to release bundles.
Validated plan execution sidecars as successful command-plan runs with exact integer zero return codes and identifiable plan-source SHA-256 provenance.
Kept plan execution sidecars out of strict release-evidence and preflight artifact-source matching.
why: Published V1 release bundles should include not only benchmark, storage, and engine-probe evidence, but also the exact managed command-plan execution summary that produced those artifacts.
